globalTheme.css: .omg-statusbar{--wx-bg:#efe6d3;--wx-ink:#1f222b;--wx-bamboo:#6e9b62;--wx-wine:#8e4d2b;--wx-sword:#717b8c;--wx-inkwash:#2b2f3a;background:radial-gradient(circle at 12% -6%,#f8f3e8 0%,#efe6d3 42%,#e4d6bb 100%);border:1px solid #9a8769;border-radius:16px;padding:12px;color:var(--wx-ink);box-shadow:0 16px 28px rgba(43,35,23,.2),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.6)}.omg-statusbar:before{content:"";display:block;height:2px;margin-bottom:8px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--wx-bamboo),var(--wx-wine),var(--wx-sword),transparent)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__tabs{margin-bottom:8px;padding:3px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(41,35,29,.12)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__tab{border-radius:999px;border:1px solid transparent;font-weight:700;color:#4a3d2b;transition:all .2s ease;cursor:pointer}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__tab:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.38)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__tab.omg-sb__tab--active{background:#1f222b;border-color:#4d5564;color:#f7ead0}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__section{border:none;background:transparent}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__section-header{padding:0 2px 8px;color:#5d4b34}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__section-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root{display:grid;gap:10px}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-node{background:rgba(60,50,37,.06);border:1px solid rgba(102,86,63,.24);border-radius:12px;padding:8px}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node{position:relative;overflow:hidden}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(1){background:linear-gradient(140deg,rgba(152,183,118,.18),rgba(110,155,98,.12));border-color:rgba(95,127,87,.4)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(1):before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(107,146,97,.12) 0,rgba(107,146,97,.12) 2px,transparent 2px,transparent 18px);pointer-events:none}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(2){background:radial-gradient(circle at 10% 0%,rgba(65,69,80,.18),rgba(34,38,48,.08) 55%,transparent 80%);border-color:rgba(53,58,70,.35)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(3){background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(219,223,232,.34),rgba(198,205,219,.24));border-color:rgba(109,116,132,.4)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(4),.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(6){background:repeating-linear-gradient(-45deg,rgba(231,214,181,.34),rgba(231,214,181,.34) 8px,rgba(221,202,166,.2) 8px,rgba(221,202,166,.2) 16px);border-color:rgba(124,106,78,.45)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(5){background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(230,234,241,.3),rgba(211,218,231,.22));border-color:rgba(122,130,146,.45)}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(7){background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(244,246,250,.48),rgba(233,237,245,.35));border-color:rgba(105,112,125,.35)}@keyframes wx-layer-rise{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px) scale(.985)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}@keyframes wx-sheen{0%{transform:translateX(-130%)}100%{transform:translateX(130%)}}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node{animation:wx-layer-rise .42s ease-out both}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(1){animation-delay:.02s}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.07s}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.12s}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.17s}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.22s}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(6){animation-delay:.27s}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(7){animation-delay:.32s}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:after{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;left:0;width:22%;background:linear-gradient(100deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.14),transparent);transform:translateX(-130%);pointer-events:none}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(3):after,.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:nth-child(5):after{animation:wx-sheen 3.6s linear infinite}.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node>*{position:relative;z-index:1}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node,.omg-statusbar .omg-sb__layout-root>.omg-sb__layout-node>.omg-sb__layout-node:after{animation:none}}
